name: linkedin-mcp-server
title: LinkedIn MCP Server — Publish Posts, Analyse & Engage on LinkedIn with Claude
description: MCP server for LinkedIn. Publish text, image, video, document and link posts, comment, react, reshare, and analyse your organisation's performance directly in Claude Desktop.

apiKey.name: LINKEDIN_ACCESS_TOKEN
apiKey.description: LinkedIn OAuth 2.0 access token (60-day lifetime). Scopes: openid, profile, w_member_social.

tools.name: linkedin_whoami
tools.description: Verify which account this token belongs to

tools.name: linkedin_list_capabilities
tools.description: List all supported content types, limits, and caveats

tools.name: linkedin_get_media_specs
tools.description: Media format specs — dimensions, size limits, formats

tools.name: linkedin_get_org_analytics
tools.description: Page views and visitor demographics for your organisation

tools.name: linkedin_get_post_analytics
tools.description: Likes, comments, and shares for a specific post

tools.name: linkedin_get_mentions
tools.description: Social actions where your organisation is mentioned

tools.name: linkedin_get_follower_stats
tools.description: Follower demographics — seniority, industry, company size

tools.name: linkedin_create_post
tools.description: Publish text, image, video, document, or link preview posts

tools.name: linkedin_share
tools.description: Reshare a post with optional commentary

features: Rich post types: text, image, video, document/carousel, link preview
First comment support auto-posted after creation
Token-bucket rate limiter respecting LinkedIn limits
Auto-retry with exponential backoff on HTTP 429
SSRF protection for media URL downloads
Upload URL pinning to LinkedIn-owned hosts
Prompt injection protection via randomised EXTCONTENT markers
In-memory client and identity cache with 4-hour TTL
